summary: Completed testing of Blendlink iteration 32 features: Push Notifications (register/test/unregister endpoints), AI Photo Analysis in minting system, Subscription Tiers, Ranked Leaderboard, and Games page. All 27 backend tests pass. Frontend Games page verified with Photo Battle Arena CTA prominently displayed.
passed_tests: Push Notifications: /api/push/register with auth token works
Push Notifications: /api/push/test with auth returns success/no_tokens
Ranked Leaderboard: Limit parameter works correctly
Subscription: /api/subscriptions/ranked/profile returns user rating and tier
Minting Photos: /api/minting/photos returns user's minted photos
frontend_tests_passed: Games page: Photo Battle Arena CTA visible with NEW badge
Games page: Minted Photos CTA visible
Games page: Casino Games CTA visible
Games page: Mini Games section visible (Spin Wheel, Scratch Card)
Games page: User balance displayed (34,000 BL)
critical_code_review_comments: Push notifications service correctly handles Expo push tokens
AI Photo Analysis uses GPT-4o Vision via Emergent LLM Key with fallback for failures
Subscription tiers properly configured: Free ($0), Basic ($4.99), Premium ($9.99)
Stripe Price IDs need to be created in Stripe Dashboard and added to .env for actual payments
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Push notifications endpoints (register/test/unregister) require auth and work correctly - returns no_tokens when no physical device registered, 2) AI Photo Analysis in minting system uses GPT-4o Vision with fallback, 3) Subscription tiers API returns free/basic/premium with correct pricing, 4) Ranked leaderboard returns list directly (not wrapped in object), 5) Games page shows Photo Battle Arena with NEW badge prominently. Stripe integration requires actual Stripe Price IDs in env for payments. Push notifications require Expo push tokens from physical devices.
